title: Aggressor (disambiguation)
content:
'''Aggressor''' could mean a number of things:
*'''''[[Aggressor (Executor-class)|Aggressor]]''''', an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]]
*'''''[[Aggressor (Imperial I-class)|Aggressor]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Aggressor (Victory-class)|Aggressor]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Aggressor (Acclamator-class)|Aggressor]]''''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]
*'''''[[Aggressor (Rishi)|Aggressor]]''''', a [[Nova Blades]]' corvette
*'[[TIE/ag "Aggressor" Starfighter/Legends|''TIE/AG Aggressor starfighter''']], one of many [[TIE series/Legends|variants]] on the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]]
*'''[[Aggressor Wing]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]
*'''[[Aggressor assault fighter/Legends|Aggressor assault fighter]]''', a [[Trilon, Inc./Legends|Trilon]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]
*'''[[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class Star Destroyer]]''' of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]
{{Disambig}}
